title: Effective date of judgment of interdiction
doc_html:
Art. 396.  Effective date of judgment of interdiction

A judgment of interdiction has effect retroactive to the date of the filing of the petition for interdiction.

Acts 2000, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 25, §1, eff. July 1, 2001.
